results.title: Best Ahrefs Alternatives & Competitors (2026)
results.content:
Spyfu Interface

© SpyFu

### 6. Mangools

The sixth tool we recommend as an alternative to Ahrefs is Mangools. To be precise, it’s rather a set of 5 SEO tools rather than one specific tool. While KWFinder is the most popular for keyword research, Mangools offers SERPChecker for comprehensive SERP analysis.

LinkMiner should also be mentioned as a full-fledged backlink analysis tool. You can use it to detect all backlinks on the site and even discover DoNotFollow and DoFollow links. Mangools keeps things straight and simple even though it’s full of valuable data. [...] In this article, we’re focusing on them. The alternatives we tested and still use to this day. Many of them will be better than this provider but admittedly, many lower-tier options won’t. We can promise you that most of them will be cheaper too!

Therefore, if you’re tired of paying for additional credits and want something to save your money, you’re going to be pleased. Let us get straight into it and see what are the closest Ahrefs competitors that you can try immediately.

## 6 Best Alternatives to Ahrefs in 2026

1. Semrush – Best alternative to Ahrefs
2. SE Ranking – Cheapest Ahrefs alternative
3. Moz Pro – Great all-around SEO solution
4. Serpstat – World-Class SEO Audit tool
5. SpyFu – Reliable alternative to analyze competitors
6. Mangools – A budget tool with great features [...] ## Best Ahrefs Alternatives in 2026 – Our Detailed List

If you need an SEO tool to track your ranking, perform on-site SEO, improve your backlinking game, or spy on your competitors, we recommend these 6 alternatives to Ahrefs.

Our honest advice is to get Semrush and enjoy its 14-day free trial because it’s the #1 Ahrefs competitor. However, if you’d rather read our opinions on each pick from the list, you can do so before making a final decision.

### 1. Semrush

Semrush is the best Ahrefs alternative if you’re dissatisfied with the latter. It’s a tool you can use for proper keyword research and gaining new information about each keyword. Moreover, Semrush supports backlink research with impeccable on-page SEO features.

results.title: Why I Ditched Ahrefs (+ 7 Best Alternatives for SEO)
results.content:
Semrush is one of the most popular Ahrefs alternatives that has been around since 2008.

Today, it offers 55 different tools for online marketers.

On top of the core SEO Toolkit, Semrush also gives you access to several add-on toolkits, depending on what you need.

These extras typically come with a 7-day free trial but incur additional costs on top of your regular SEO Toolkit subscription. Here’s a quick rundown: [...] 1. Semrush SEO Toolkit – Has more accurate data than Ahrefs and over 55 SEO features.  If you are looking for an SEO + AI search visibility toolkit, Semrush has recently launched Semrush One. It’s an AI SEO tool that combines two toolkits under one subscription.
2. Search Atlas — An affordable alternative to Ahrefs that offers an AI SEO solution for agencies.
3. KIME — AI visibility tool for agencies, SaaS, product, and service companies.
4. SERanking — SEO software for agencies with an AI Overviews tracker.
5. Writesonic— An AI-powered SEO agent for all SEO, content writing, and generative engine optimization (GEO) tasks.
6. Ubersuggest — My top SEO pick for hobbyists and small site owners. [...] I bought the Individual plan back in December 2024 because I was looking for an affordable SEO tool for my website. It’s now February 2026, and I’m still using it regularly!

Ubersuggest is a cheaper alternative to Ahrefs. It’s perfect if you’re running a small business or just doing SEO for your own website and don’t want to spend a fortune. Neil Patel bought Ubersuggest in 2017 because he wanted to make an SEO tool that could compete with the pricier options out there.

Here’s what you get for $29 a month or $290 lifetime:

results.content:
## Why should you consider Mangools over Ahrefs?

Mangools is the best free Ahrefs alternative, combining user-friendliness, affordability, and all the essential SEO tools you need to grow your website - with no extra fluff or confusing features.

### Intuitive and friendly UI

Unlike Ahrefs’ complex interface, Mangools offers a clean, simple UI that’s easy to navigate. Even if you’re new to SEO, you’ll find it straightforward and user-friendly.

Image 7: Mangools vs. Moz

### Affordable pricing with all features included

Mangools' plans are clear and budget-friendly, making them perfect for anyone looking for a more affordable alternative to Ahrefs - whether you're a freelancer, small business owner, or agency. No hidden costs or unexpected bills.

results.title: I've Tested 6 Ahrefs Alternatives: Here's What Works
results.content:
Here’s a quick overview of my top picks:

1. RankDots – The Next-Gen Ahrefs Alternative
2. SEO PowerSuite – The All-in-One SEO Toolkit
3. Semrush – Enterprise Alternative with Broad Data Reach
4. SE Ranking – Affordable Cloud-Based Alternative
5. Mangools – Simplified SEO for Beginners and Long-Tail Focus
6. Ubersuggest – Best Free/Entry-Level Ahrefs Alternative

### #1: RankDots – The Next-Gen Ahrefs Alternative

.

This means that instead of dumping thousands of keywords into a spreadsheet, RankDots groups them into ready-to-publish content topics, showing exactly how your site can build topical authority.

It saves hours of manual grouping and guesswork — and that’s something even Ahrefs doesn’t automate.

#### AI-powered keyword clustering and intent analysis [...] ### 4. SE Ranking offers premium value for its price

SE Ranking is ideal for small teams needing reliable rank tracking, keyword research, and basic backlink data.  
 It’s cloud-based, intuitive, and 60–70% cheaper than Ahrefs.  
 A great fit for SMBs balancing cost and performance.

### 5. Mangools and Ubersuggest are perfect for beginners

For new SEOs, bloggers, or micro-businesses, Mangools and Ubersuggest provide the easiest learning curve.  
 Their clean UIs and simplified metrics make them great entry points into professional SEO.

### 6. Combining tools delivers the best ROI [...] 1. Use RankDots to discover topics and prioritize keywords by potential traffic gain.
2. Export selected clusters into Rank Tracker for ongoing rank monitoring.
3. Audit corresponding pages with WebSite Auditor to ensure perfect on-page optimization.
4. Track backlinks to those pages with SEO SpyGlass for authority building.

The result? A streamlined SEO cycle from ideation to execution — all without touching Ahrefs once.

In short, if you need a comprehensive, budget-friendly, and privacy-aware SEO toolkit, SEO PowerSuite is one of the strongest Ahrefs alternatives in 2025. It’s built for professionals who care about accuracy and scalability over flash.

### #3: Semrush – Enterprise Alternative with Broad Data Reach

 than Ahrefs.

#### When Semrush makes sense vs Ahrefs

results.title: The 17 Best Ahrefs Alternatives for Every Budget
results.content:
Mangool has an intuitive UI and various SEO features for keyword research, competitor analysis, backlink audit and analysis, rank tracking, and search engine result page (SERP) review.

#### Pros

I’ve been using Mangools for over a year in addition to Semrush.

Mangool’s free version allows you to analyze keyword difficulty and search volumes in a target country, find semantically related keywords, and review top-performing competitors.

Moreover, you can set up keyword position tracking. However, you can only track up to five keywords using the Mangools free plan.

There are also link-building and site audit features, making it a great alternative to Ahrefs.

#### Cons

Mangools’ database of websites and backlinks is quite limited compared to Ahrefs and other SEO tools.
